task_completion.description: The agent opens the attribute table or feature form for the 'forest_stands' layer to view the 'last_inventory_date'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the QField interface with the 'forest_stands' layer selected and its attributes (specifically 'last_inventory_date') visible.

task_completion.description: The agent changes the 'reinventory_status' field from 'CURRENT' to 'OVERDUE' for an overdue stand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the feature edit form in QField where 'reinventory_status' is being changed to or is set as 'OVERDUE'.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the calculated number of years since the last inventory into the 'field_notes' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing text input in the 'field_notes' field of the QField edit form, containing a number representing the years overdue (e.g., '5', '8 years').

task_completion.description: The agent sets the 'priority_rank' field to 1 or 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'priority_rank' field in the QField edit form being set to '1' or '2'.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the 'tree_measurements' layer to add a new record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the QField layer panel switching to 'tree_measurements' or the interface for adding a new feature to this layer.

task_completion.description: The agent fills out a new tree measurement record with required fields (tree_tag, species_code, dbh_inches, total_height_ft, stand_id).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the feature form for 'tree_measurements' being filled with plausible data (e.g., species_code like 'POTR5' or 'PIRE', numeric values for dbh and height, and a stand_id).

task_completion.description: The agent saves the edits made to the layers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent tapping the checkmark button to save the feature, or toggling edit mode off and confirming to save changes in QField.

integrity.description: The agent uses the QField application interface to make changes rather than a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QField Android application is visible in the screenshots, with interactions happening through its native UI elements.

integrity.description: The agent manually types the updated values into the QField feature forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The on-screen keyboard is visible, and values are being typed into the QField attribute fields.

integrity.description: The agent does not use a terminal emulator or write scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal apps (like Termux) or code editors are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the 'forest_stands' and 'tree_measurements' layers in the GeoPackage. Overdue stands are those with a last_inventory_date of 2019 or earlier (relative to 2024-07-01). Priority rank 1 is for >7 years overdue (2016 or earlier), and rank 2 is for 5-7 years overdue (2017-2019). Valid species codes include POTR5, ABBA, ACSA3, PIRE, PIBA2 depending on the forest type.
